Perknowing (prajna) is the goal of [[Enlensing]].<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VxmtLjEm2vU</ref>

Its etymology is a [[root conversion]] of prajna.

https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/per- https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/know

It is a simultaneous instance of [[resonant at-onement]] (the goal of Mithra mysticism) and a [[Pure Consciousness Event|pure consciousness event]] (the goal of Varuna mysticism)<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bPHqY4WiwwU</ref>

== References ==
[[Category:Enlensing]]
[[sn:Perknowledge]][[Category:Absurdity]]
[[Category:Knowledge]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Perknowledge]][[Category:Higher States of Consciousness]]
[[Category:Pages]]
